expectations.text: Concludes do NOT log it as a loss (the headline question)
expectations.evidence: 'No. Do NOT log this as a loss.' stated up front.

expectations.text: Identifies it as a mid-game / non-terminal snapshot, because solitaire-game-* is a snapshot and gameWon:false means not-won-yet
expectations.evidence: Record class PENDING-SNAPSHOT; explains solitaire-game- prefix is a snapshot, gameWon false = not won yet.

expectations.text: Recognizes the pipeline cannot distinguish snapshot from terminal (or cites that #a11e74 itself later won)
expectations.evidence: Ran classify_file live, showed it returns win_record and copies gameWon=false; cited #a11e74 later won.

expectations.text: Recommends not cataloging an outcome and awaiting the terminal solitaire-win-* (defer live kill/continue to solitaire-analyst)
expectations.evidence: Ingest file but record no outcome; await terminal solitaire-win-*; hand live kill/continue to solitaire-analyst.
